c74object.name: dk.resonatorscreate~
c74object.description: The dk.resonatorscreate~ object analyzes a loaded audio file for sinusoidal components (frequency/gain) as well as derivative of loudness, in order to create CNMAT formatted tuplets of frequency, gain, and decay rate. This can be then loaded into dk.resonators~.
c74object.discussion: Based on the approach taken in CNMAT's resonators~ algorithm. For more information visit https://cycling74.com/packages/cnmat-externals

outlet.description: Sinusoidal components as a laced list of frequency/gain pairs for visualization.

objarg.name: default
objarg.digest: JSON file to load by default
objarg.description: JSON file to load by default.

method.name: analyze
method.description: Analyze the loaded file with the current settings.

method.name: play
method.digest: Play back the currently loaded file
method.description: Play back the currently loaded file.

method.name: read
method.description: Reads a sample to analyze directly from a relative or absolute path. With no additional argument, a file dialog will appear to choose a file.

method.name: stop
method.digest: Stop playback of the currently loaded file
method.description: Stop playback of the currently loaded file.

method.name: write
method.description: Write a .json file with all the required information to recreate the model.

attribute.name: normalize
attribute.digest: Whether the gains will be normalized or not
attribute.description: Whether the gains will be normalized or not.

attribute.name: numpeaks
attribute.digest: The amount of peaks to create a resynthesis with
attribute.description: The amount of peaks to create a resynthesis with.

attribute.name: time_centroid
attribute.digest: Whether the analysis will be on the entire file or only on the first half of the time centroid
attribute.description: Whether the analysis will be on the entire file or only on the first half of the time centroid.
